# CWE-79 negative: taint-tracked XSS with html.EscapeString
lang: go
file: CWE-79-taint-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"html"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

func RenderPage(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	safe := html.EscapeString(name)
	t := template.Must(template.New("x").Parse("<html>{{.}}</html>"))
	_ = t.Execute(w, safe)
}
